summary: Full retest of Yrvante Lead Finder after Google Places API activation. All backend and frontend features working correctly. kapper/Rotterdam returns 4 leads from 60 total businesses. restaurant/Amsterdam returns 2 leads from 60 total businesses.

issues: Badge element has no data-testid='hero-badge' (uses button without testid) - minor, doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Loading skeleton data-testid is 'loading-state' not 'loading-skeleton' (noted for future test consistency)
CSV button data-testid is 'export-csv-button' not 'csv-export-button' (noted for future test consistency)
Results table data-testid is 'leads-table' not 'results-table' (noted for future test consistency)

success_rate.frontend: 100% - all features working: hero, search form, loading state, results table with 4 columns (Bedrijfsnaam/Adres/Telefoonnummer/Actie), CSV export button, Maps links target=_blank, HTML5 required validation, responsive mobile layout

context_for_next_testing_agent: All features work. kapper/Rotterdam returns 4 leads (60 total scanned). Correct data-testids: leads-table, export-csv-button, loading-state, lead-row-{idx}, lead-naam-{idx}. Previous blocker (Google Places API not enabled) is now resolved.
